summary:
Recovery: Average

Reading: You're a couple hours in and energy's running light — that Chick-fil-A and Perfect Bar this morning got you going, but it's the only thing you've logged and the protein's barely off the floor. Last night ran short on sleep, so the move is to fuel with intent instead of coasting: you're working off an average reserve today, not a full one, and letting protein drift now is how you end up chasing a gap you can't close by evening. Nothing's nagging physically — make your next meal a real protein plate and get some water down before midday.

Performance: Moderate effort. You're on an average night and a short one at that, so train — just keep it controlled and don't chase heavy numbers on tired legs.

Transit: none
